description: Workflow to process cover photos including title update, notification creation, and view count initialization
name: cover_photo_processing_workflow

transitions.description: Update photo title by appending [Processed] if not present
transitions.name: update_photo_title

transitions.description: Create notification about the new cover photo added
transitions.end_state_description: Notification entity created for new cover photo
transitions.name: create_notification

transitions.description: Initialize the view count for the new cover photo
transitions.end_state_description: View count initialized for the cover photo
transitions.name: initialize_view_count
transitions.start_state_description: Notification entity created for new cover photo
